name: Aisha Rahman
bio: Roommates during undergrad at BUET. She moved to Toronto after grad school but we still try to catch up regularly.

name: Marcus Webb
bio: Former team lead at my first job. Taught me everything about shipping products under pressure. Still grab coffee every few weeks.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Grew up two houses apart. Our families have been close for decades. She's a pediatrician now in Bangalore.

name: Tariq Hossain
bio: Met during a backpacking trip through Southeast Asia. We've since traveled to 8 countries together. Huge football fan.

name: Sofia Hernandez
bio: We bonded over late-night debugging sessions at a startup. She's now a freelance UX designer and always gives brutally honest feedback.

name: James Okafor
bio: Old gym partner from the neighbourhood. We used to train together every Saturday morning. He relocated to London last year.

name: Nadia Chowdhury
bio: Our parents introduced us at a community event when we were teenagers. She's one of the most grounded people I know — now runs her own bakery.

name: Ethan Park
bio: Met in a computer science elective. We still play games online together on weekends. He's doing his PhD in machine learning at MIT.
